items.title: Show HN: Explore color palettes inspired by 3000 master painter artworks
items.description:
I built PaletteInspiration.com, a browsable archive of color palettes pulled from artworks by 3,000+ master painters (Monet, Vermeer, Raphael, Van Gogh).
Why I built it: every color palette generator I tried converged on the same five muted pastels.
